name: Sausage Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground meat until fully browned.
2. Add chunks of Velveeta cheese and melt together.
3. Stir in the Ro-Tel tomatoes, chopped chili peppers, ground sausage, and minced onion until well combined.
4. Mix in the cream of mushroom soup and garlic powder to taste.
5. Serve hot.
